summary: Fixed three niri-session startup gaps: waybar spawn-at-startup, absolute wallpaper path (/etc/wallpapers/riverside.jpg), and a writeShellScriptBin polkit-gnome-authentication-agent-1 wrapper + spawn-at-startup line. GNOME session untouched. All headless verification (nix flake check, nixos-rebuild build .#hamsa, home-manager build .#benjamin) passed.

artifacts.summary: Added spawn-at-startup lines for waybar and polkit-gnome-authentication-agent-1; changed swaybg -i argument to absolute /etc/wallpapers/riverside.jpg; corrected stale autostart-section comment
Added writeShellScriptBin "polkit-gnome-authentication-agent-1" wrapper (mirrors zathura/sioyek pattern); removed obsolete commented polkit_gnome line

completion_data.completion_summary: Fixed three niri-session startup gaps: waybar now spawns via spawn-at-startup, the wallpaper path is now absolute, and a writeShellScriptBin polkit-gnome-authentication-agent-1 wrapper plus its spawn-at-startup line give the niri session a working polkit auth agent. GNOME session untouched. nix flake check, nixos-rebuild build --flake .#hamsa, and home-manager build --flake .#benjamin all passed headlessly.

next_steps: Manual user step: sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake .#hamsa then home-manager switch --flake .#benjamin, then log out/in to the niri session via GDM and visually confirm waybar, wallpaper, and a polkit auth dialog (e.g. mounting a disk in GNOME Disks).
